response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep technical breadth across distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and AI-agent tooling at Naver, with strong ownership and cross-functional experience — aligning well with the role’s core requirements. His hands-on work with agentic workflows and open-source infrastructure shows he’s comfortable in AI-native environments. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of operational on-call ownership and agile scrum champion experience, and his German language limitation may hinder stakeholder alignment in Berlin.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and code generation tooling at Naver
Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures across multiple roles
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
concerns: No explicit mention of operational on-call responsibility or incident response processes
Limited evidence of formal Agile scrum champion rotation or sprint leadership
Basic German proficiency may limit effectiveness in local stakeholder collaboration
